title: Yogyakarta Route
description: Find routes and solve TSP across Yogyakarta landmarks. Floating collapsible panel, real road distances via pgRouting + Supabase.

title: München Route · Float
description: Find routes and solve TSP across Munich landmarks. Floating collapsible panel, fun colourful style, real road distances via pgRouting + Supabase.

title: München Route Finder
description: Find routes between 25 Munich landmarks, click any two points, or solve TSP for up to 8 stops. Real road distances via pgRouting.

title: Ljubljana Route Finder
description: Find the real road route between 25 Ljubljana landmarks. Powered by pgRouting on Supabase — actual street distances, walk and drive time estimates.

title: Daylight Duration
description: How many hours of daylight — or fasting — does each latitude get? Switch between Daylight and Fasting mode (6 Islamic methods + custom), animate through the year, and see polar effects.

title: World Overview
description: A simple world map using OpenStreetMap tiles, rendered with OpenLayers.

title: City Explorer
description: Smooth vector tile map with MapLibre GL JS. Pan and zoom around any city.

title: 3D Globe
description: An interactive 3D globe using CesiumJS. Rotate and zoom the entire Earth.
